sections.title: Acts Done by Several Persons in Furtherance of Common Intention
sections.content: When a criminal act is done by several persons in furtherance of the common intention of all, each of such persons is liable for that act in the same manner as if it were done by him alone.
sections.content_ur: جب کوئی مجرمانہ فعل متعدد اشخاص سب کے مشترکہ ارادے کے فروغ میں کریں تو ان میں سے ہر شخص اس فعل کا اسی طرح ذمہ دار ہوگا جیسے اس نے خود اکیلے کیا ہو۔

sections.title: Punishment of Abetment
sections.content: Whoever abets any offence shall, if the act abetted is committed in consequence of the abetment, and no express provision is made by this Code for the punishment of such abetment, be punished with the punishment provided for the offence.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی کسی جرم کی اعانت کرے اور اعانت کے نتیجے میں وہ فعل ہو جائے تو اسے اس جرم کی سزا ملے گی۔

sections.title: Rioting Armed with Deadly Weapon
sections.content: Whoever is guilty of rioting, being armed with a deadly weapon or with anything which, used as a weapon of offence, is likely to cause death, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی فساد کا مرتکب ہو اور مہلک ہتھیار سے مسلح ہو۔

sections.title: Use of Derogatory Remarks in Respect of the Holy Prophet
sections.content: Whoever by words, either spoken or written, or by visible representation, or by any imputation, innuendo, or insinuation, directly or indirectly, defiles the sacred name of the Holy Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him) shall be punished with death, or imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی الفاظ سے تقریری یا تحریری یا نمائندگی سے حضور نبی کریم صلی اللہ علیہ وسلم کے مقدس نام کی توہین کرے۔

sections.title: Punishment of Qatl-i-Amd
sections.content: Whoever commits qatl-i-amd shall, subject to the provisions of this Chapter be: (a) punished with death as qisas; (b) punished with death or imprisonment for life as ta'zir having regard to the facts and circumstances of the case, if the proof in either of the forms specified in section 304 is not available; or (c) punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to twenty-five years.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی قتل عمد کا ارتکاب کرے گا وہ اس باب کی دفعات کے تابع سزا پائے گا۔

sections.title: Qatl-i-Amd Not Liable to Qisas
sections.content: Qatl-i-amd shall not be liable to qisas in the following cases, namely: (a) when an offender is a minor or insane; (b) when any wali of the victim is a direct descendant, how low so ever, of the offender.
sections.content_ur: قتل عمد درج ذیل صورتوں میں قصاص کا مستحق نہیں ہوگا۔

sections.title: Qatl-i-Khata
sections.content: Whoever, without any intention to cause death of, or cause harm to, a person, causes death of such person, either by doing an unlawful act or by doing a lawful act in an unlawful manner, is said to commit qatl-i-khata.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی بغیر ارادے قتل یا نقصان کے کسی شخص کی موت کا سبب بنے وہ قتل خطا کا مرتکب ہوگا۔

sections.title: Itlaf-i-Udw
sections.content: Whoever destroys or permanently impairs the functioning of any organ or limb of another person is said to cause itlaf-i-udw.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی دوسرے شخص کے کسی عضو کو تلف یا مستقل طور پر ناکارہ کرے۔

sections.title: Assault or Criminal Force to Woman with Intent to Outrage Her Modesty
sections.content: Whoever assaults or uses criminal force to any woman, intending to outrage or knowing it to be likely that he will thereby outrage her modesty, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی کسی عورت پر حملہ کرے یا مجرمانہ طاقت استعمال کرے اس کی عصمت دری کے ارادے سے۔

sections.title: Kidnapping, Abducting or Inducing Woman to Compel for Marriage
sections.content: Whoever kidnaps or abducts any woman with intent that she may be compelled, or knowing it to be likely that she will be compelled, to marry any person against her will, shall be punished with imprisonment for life and with fine.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی کسی عورت کو اغوا کرے اس ارادے سے کہ اسے شادی پر مجبور کیا جائے۔

sections.title: Punishment for Rape
sections.content: Whoever commits rape shall be punished with death or imprisonment of either description for a term which shall not be less than ten years or more than twenty-five years and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی زنا بالجبر کا ارتکاب کرے گا اسے سزائے موت یا قید کی سزا ہو گی۔

sections.title: Punishment for Criminal Breach of Trust
sections.content: Whoever commits criminal breach of trust shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی مجرمانہ بد عہدی کا ارتکاب کرے اسے تین سال تک قید یا جرمانے کی سزا ہوگی۔

sections.title: Cheating and Dishonestly Inducing Delivery of Property
sections.content: Whoever cheats and thereby dishonestly induces the person deceived to deliver any property to any person, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی دھوکہ دہی سے کسی شخص کو جائیداد حوالے کرنے پر مجبور کرے۔

sections.title: Dishonestly Issuing a Cheque
sections.content: Whoever dishonestly issues a cheque towards repayment of a loan or fulfillment of an obligation which is dishonoured on presentation, shall be punished with imprisonment which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی بددیانتی سے چیک جاری کرے جو واپس ہو جائے۔

sections.title: Punishment for Criminal Intimidation
sections.content: Whoever commits the offence of criminal intimidation shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both. If threat be to cause death or grievous hurt, shall be punished with imprisonment which may extend to seven years, or with fine, or with both.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی مجرمانہ دھمکی دے اسے دو سال تک قید یا جرمانے کی سزا ہوگی۔

sections.title: Information in Cognizable Cases (FIR)
sections.content: Every information relating to the commission of a cognizable offence, if given orally to an officer in charge of a police station, shall be reduced to writing by him or under his direction, and be read over to the informant; and every such information, whether given in writing or reduced to writing as aforesaid, shall be signed by the person giving it, and the substance thereof shall be entered in a book.
sections.content_ur: قابل دست اندازی جرائم کی ہر اطلاع تحریری طور پر درج کی جائے گی۔

sections.title: Examination of Witnesses by Police
sections.content: Any police officer making an investigation may examine orally any person supposed to be acquainted with the facts and circumstances of the case. Such person shall be bound to answer all questions relating to such case put to him by such officer.
sections.content_ur: تفتیش کرنے والا پولیس افسر کسی بھی شخص سے زبانی پوچھ گچھ کر سکتا ہے۔

sections.title: Recording of Confessions and Statements
sections.content: Any Metropolitan Magistrate or Magistrate of the first class may record any confession or statement made to him in the course of an investigation or at any time afterwards before the commencement of the inquiry or trial.
sections.content_ur: میٹروپولیٹن مجسٹریٹ یا درجہ اول کا مجسٹریٹ تفتیش کے دوران کوئی بھی اعتراف جرم یا بیان ریکارڈ کر سکتا ہے۔

sections.title: Report of Police Officer (Challan)
sections.content: Every investigation shall be completed without unnecessary delay. As soon as it is completed, the officer in charge of the police station shall forward to a Magistrate empowered to take cognizance of the offence on a police report, a report in the form prescribed.
sections.content_ur: ہر تفتیش بغیر غیر ضروری تاخیر کے مکمل کی جائے گی اور رپورٹ مجسٹریٹ کو بھیجی جائے گی۔

sections.title: Power to Acquit at Any Stage
sections.content: When in any case instituted upon complaint or upon a police report, the Magistrate or Court considers the charge against the accused to be groundless, it shall acquit the accused and record reasons.
sections.content_ur: جب مجسٹریٹ یا عدالت ملزم کے خلاف الزام کو بے بنیاد سمجھے تو ملزم کو بری کر دے گی۔

sections.title: Acquittal
sections.content: If after taking the evidence for the prosecution, examining the accused and hearing the prosecution and the defence on the point, the Court considers that there is no evidence that the accused committed the offence, the Court shall record an order of acquittal.
sections.content_ur: اگر استغاثہ کے شواہد کے بعد عدالت سمجھے کہ ملزم نے جرم نہیں کیا تو بریت کا حکم ریکارڈ کرے گی۔

sections.title: Compounding of Offences
sections.content: The offences punishable under the sections of the Pakistan Penal Code specified in the first two columns of the table next following may be compounded by the persons mentioned in the third column of that table.
sections.content_ur: مجموعہ تعزیرات پاکستان کی مخصوص دفعات کے تحت قابل سزا جرائم معاف کیے جا سکتے ہیں۔

sections.title: Calling for Records to Examine Correctness
sections.content: The High Court may call for and examine the record of any proceeding before any Criminal Court for the purpose of satisfying itself as to the correctness, legality or propriety of any finding, sentence, or order.
sections.content_ur: ہائی کورٹ کسی بھی فوجداری عدالت کے ریکارڈ طلب کر کے جائزہ لے سکتی ہے۔

sections.title: Suspension of Sentence Pending Appeal
sections.content: Pending any appeal by a convicted person, the Appellate Court may order that the execution of the sentence or order appealed against be suspended and also release him on bail.
sections.content_ur: اپیل کے دوران سزا یافتہ شخص کی سزا معطل کی جا سکتی ہے اور ضمانت پر رہا کیا جا سکتا ہے۔

sections.title: When Bail May Be Taken in Case of Non-Bailable Offence
sections.content: When any person accused of any non-bailable offence is arrested or detained without warrant by an officer in charge of a police station, or appears or is brought before a Court, he may be released on bail, but shall not be so released if there appear reasonable grounds for believing that he has been guilty of an offence punishable with death or imprisonment for life.
sections.content_ur: جب کوئی شخص ناقابل ضمانت جرم میں گرفتار ہو تو ضمانت پر رہا کیا جا سکتا ہے۔

sections.title: Bail After Arrest by Police
sections.content: When any person other than a person accused of a non-bailable offence is arrested or detained without warrant by an officer in charge of a police station, the officer in charge may release him on his executing a bond.
sections.content_ur: جب کوئی شخص قابل ضمانت جرم میں گرفتار ہو تو تھانے کا افسر اسے مچلکے پر رہا کر سکتا ہے۔

sections.title: Right of Individuals to Be Dealt with in Accordance with Law
sections.content: To enjoy the protection of law and to be treated in accordance with law is the inalienable right of every citizen, wherever he may be, and of every other person for the time being within Pakistan.
sections.content_ur: قانون کا تحفظ حاصل کرنا اور قانون کے مطابق سلوک ہر شہری کا ناقابل تنسیخ حق ہے۔

sections.title: Laws Inconsistent with Fundamental Rights to Be Void
sections.content: Any law, or any custom or usage having the force of law, in so far as it is inconsistent with the rights conferred by this Chapter, shall, to the extent of such inconsistency, be void.
sections.content_ur: کوئی بھی قانون جو بنیادی حقوق سے متصادم ہو کالعدم ہوگا۔

sections.title: Security of Person
sections.content: No person shall be deprived of life or liberty save in accordance with law.
sections.content_ur: کسی شخص کو زندگی یا آزادی سے محروم نہیں کیا جائے گا سوائے قانون کے مطابق۔

sections.title: Safeguards as to Arrest and Detention
sections.content: No person who is arrested shall be detained in custody without being informed, as soon as may be, of the grounds for such arrest, nor shall he be denied the right to consult and be defended by a legal practitioner of his choice.
sections.content_ur: کسی بھی گرفتار شخص کو گرفتاری کی وجوہات بتائے بغیر حراست میں نہیں رکھا جائے گا۔

sections.title: Right to Fair Trial
sections.content: For the determination of his civil rights and obligations or in any criminal charge against him, a person shall be entitled to a fair trial and due process.
sections.content_ur: ہر شخص کو منصفانہ مقدمے اور مناسب قانونی عمل کا حق حاصل ہے۔

sections.title: Inviolability of Dignity of Man
sections.content: The dignity of man and, subject to law, the privacy of home, shall be inviolable. No person shall be subjected to torture for the purpose of extracting evidence.
sections.content_ur: انسان کا وقار اور گھر کی پرائیویسی ناقابل تسخیر ہے۔

sections.title: Freedom of Association
sections.content: Every citizen shall have the right to form associations or unions, subject to any reasonable restrictions imposed by law in the interest of sovereignty or integrity of Pakistan, public order or morality.
sections.content_ur: ہر شہری کو انجمنیں یا یونینز بنانے کا حق ہوگا۔

sections.title: Freedom of Trade, Business or Profession
sections.content: Subject to such qualifications, if any, as may be prescribed by law, every citizen shall have the right to enter upon any lawful profession or occupation, and to conduct any lawful trade or business.
sections.content_ur: ہر شہری کو جائز پیشہ یا کاروبار اختیار کرنے کا حق ہوگا۔

sections.title: Freedom of Speech
sections.content: Every citizen shall have the right to freedom of speech and expression, and there shall be freedom of the press, subject to any reasonable restrictions imposed by law in the interest of the glory of Islam or the integrity, security or defence of Pakistan.
sections.content_ur: ہر شہری کو آزادی اظہار کا حق ہوگا اور پریس کی آزادی ہوگی۔

sections.title: Right to Information
sections.content: Every citizen shall have the right to have access to information in all matters of public importance subject to regulation and reasonable restrictions imposed by law.
sections.content_ur: ہر شہری کو عوامی اہمیت کے تمام معاملات میں معلومات تک رسائی کا حق ہوگا۔

sections.title: Provision as to Property
sections.content: Every citizen shall have the right to acquire, hold and dispose of property in any part of Pakistan, subject to the Constitution and any reasonable restrictions imposed by law.
sections.content_ur: ہر شہری کو پاکستان کے کسی بھی حصے میں جائیداد حاصل کرنے کا حق ہوگا۔

sections.title: Equality of Citizens
sections.content: All citizens are equal before law and are entitled to equal protection of law. There shall be no discrimination on the basis of sex alone. Nothing in this Article shall prevent the State from making any special provision for the protection of women and children.
sections.content_ur: تمام شہری قانون کے سامنے برابر ہیں اور قانون کے یکساں تحفظ کے حقدار ہیں۔

sections.title: Original Jurisdiction of Supreme Court (Fundamental Rights)
sections.content: The Supreme Court shall, if it considers that a question of public importance with reference to the enforcement of any of the Fundamental Rights conferred by Chapter I of Part II is involved, have the power to make an order of the nature mentioned in Article 199.
sections.content_ur: سپریم کورٹ کو بنیادی حقوق کے نفاذ سے متعلق عوامی اہمیت کے سوال پر اصل دائرہ اختیار حاصل ہے۔

sections.title: Jurisdiction of High Court (Writ Petition)
sections.content: Each High Court may, if it is satisfied that no other adequate remedy is provided by law: (a) direct any person performing functions in connection with the affairs of the Federation, a Province, or a local authority, to refrain from doing anything he is not permitted by law to do.
sections.content_ur: ہائی کورٹ کو رٹ پٹیشن سننے کا اختیار ہے۔

sections.title: Unauthorized Access to Information System
sections.content: Whoever intentionally gains unauthorized access to any information system or data shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to three months or with fine which may extend to fifty thousand rupees or with both.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی جان بوجھ کر کسی انفارمیشن سسٹم تک غیر مجاز رسائی حاصل کرے۔

sections.title: Cyber Terrorism
sections.content: Whoever commits or threatens to commit any of the offences under sections 6, 7, 8 or 9, where the commission or threat is with the intent to: (a) coerce, intimidate, overawe or create a sense of fear, panic or insecurity in the Government or the public, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to fourteen years or with fine which may extend to fifty million rupees or with both.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی سائبر دہشت گردی کا ارتکاب کرے یا دھمکی دے۔

sections.title: Offences Against Modesty of a Natural Person and Minor
sections.content: Whoever intentionally and publicly exhibits or displays or transmits any information which superimposes a photograph of the face of a natural person over any sexually explicit image shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to five years or with fine which may extend to five million rupees or with both.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی جان بوجھ کر کسی فطری شخص کی تصویر فحش تصویر پر لگائے۔

sections.title: Offences Against Dignity of a Natural Person
sections.content: Whoever intentionally and publicly exhibits or displays or transmits any information through any information system, which he knows to be false, and intimidates or harms the reputation or privacy of a natural person, shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to three years or with fine which may extend to one million rupees or with both.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی جان بوجھ کر کسی فطری شخص کی عزت یا رازداری کو نقصان پہنچائے۔

sections.title: Cyber Stalking
sections.content: Whoever with intent to coerce, intimidate, or harass any person uses information technology, electronic communication, or electronic mail, to: (a) follow a person or contacts or attempts to contact such person to foster personal interaction despite a clear indication of disinterest, shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to three years or fine which may extend to one million rupees or with both.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی کسی شخص کو ڈرانے یا ہراساں کرنے کے ارادے سے انفارمیشن ٹیکنالوجی استعمال کرے۔

sections.title: Succession
sections.content: In the event of the death of any son or daughter of the propositus before the opening of succession, the children of such son or daughter, if any, living at the time the succession opens, shall per stirpes receive a share equivalent to the share which such son or daughter, as the case may be, would have received if alive.
sections.content_ur: اگر مورث کا کوئی بیٹا یا بیٹی وراثت کھلنے سے پہلے فوت ہو جائے تو ان کے بچے حصہ وصول کریں گے۔

sections.title: Registration of Marriages
sections.content: Every marriage solemnized under Muslim Law shall be registered in accordance with the provisions of this Ordinance. Whoever contravenes the provisions shall be punishable with simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to three months, or with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees, or with both.
sections.content_ur: مسلم قانون کے تحت ہونے والا ہر نکاح اس آرڈیننس کی دفعات کے مطابق رجسٹرڈ ہوگا۔

sections.title: Polygamy
sections.content: No man, during the subsistence of an existing marriage, shall, except with the previous permission in writing of the Arbitration Council, contract another marriage. Any man who contravenes the provisions shall pay immediately the entire amount of the dower, whether prompt or deferred, due to the existing wife or wives.
sections.content_ur: کوئی مرد موجودہ نکاح کے دوران ثالثی کونسل کی تحریری اجازت کے بغیر دوسرا نکاح نہیں کرے گا۔

sections.title: Talaq
sections.content: Any man who wishes to divorce his wife shall, as soon as may be after the pronouncement of talaq in any form whatsoever, give the Chairman notice in writing of his having done so, and shall supply a copy thereof to the wife. Whoever contravenes shall be punishable with simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to one year, or with fine which may extend to five thousand rupees, or with both.
sections.content_ur: کوئی بھی شخص جو اپنی بیوی کو طلاق دینا چاہے، طلاق کے اعلان کے بعد جلد از جلد چیئرمین کو تحریری اطلاع دے گا۔

sections.title: Maintenance
sections.content: If any husband fails to maintain his wife adequately, or where there are more wives than one, fails to maintain them equitably, the wife, or all or any of the wives, may in addition to seeking any other legal remedy available apply to the Chairman who shall constitute an Arbitration Council to determine the matter.
sections.content_ur: اگر کوئی شوہر اپنی بیوی کا نفقہ مناسب طور پر ادا نہ کرے تو بیوی چیئرمین سے رجوع کر سکتی ہے۔

sections.title: Dower (Mahr)
sections.content: Where no details about the mode of payment of dower are specified in the nikahnama, or the marriage contract, the entire amount of the dower shall be presumed to be payable on demand.
sections.content_ur: جہاں مہر کی ادائیگی کی تفصیلات نکاح نامے میں نہ ہوں تو پورا مہر مطالبے پر ادا ہوگا۔

sections.title: Transfer of Property Defined
sections.content: Transfer of property means an act by which a living person conveys property, in present or in future, to one or more other living persons, or to himself and one or more other living persons.
sections.content_ur: جائیداد کی منتقلی سے مراد وہ فعل ہے جس کے ذریعے زندہ شخص جائیداد دوسرے کو حوالے کرے۔

sections.title: Sale Defined
sections.content: Sale is a transfer of ownership in exchange for a price paid or promised or part-paid and part-promised. A contract for the sale of immovable property is a contract that a sale of such property shall take place on terms settled between the parties.
sections.content_ur: فروخت قیمت کے عوض ملکیت کی منتقلی ہے۔

sections.title: Mortgage Defined
sections.content: A mortgage is the transfer of an interest in specific immoveable property for the purpose of securing the payment of money advanced or to be advanced by way of loan.
sections.content_ur: رہن مخصوص غیر منقولہ جائیداد میں مفاد کی منتقلی ہے قرض کی ادائیگی کی ضمانت کے لیے۔

sections.title: Lease Defined
sections.content: A lease of immoveable property is a transfer of a right to enjoy such property, made for a certain time, express or implied, or in perpetuity, in consideration of a price paid or promised.
sections.content_ur: غیر منقولہ جائیداد کا اجارہ ایک مقررہ مدت کے لیے اس جائیداد سے فائدہ اٹھانے کے حق کی منتقلی ہے۔

sections.title: Duration of Certain Leases
sections.content: In the absence of a contract or local law or usage to the contrary, a lease of immoveable property for agricultural or manufacturing purposes shall be deemed to be a lease from year to year.
sections.content_ur: معاہدے یا مقامی قانون کی عدم موجودگی میں اجارہ سال بہ سال تصور ہوگا۔

sections.title: Gift Defined
sections.content: Gift is the transfer of certain existing moveable or immoveable property made voluntarily and without consideration, by one person, called the donor, to another, called the donee, and accepted by or on behalf of the donee.
sections.content_ur: ہبہ کسی موجودہ جائیداد کی رضاکارانہ منتقلی ہے بغیر عوض کے۔

sections.title: Income Defined
sections.content: Income includes any amount chargeable to tax under this Ordinance, any amount subject to collection or deduction of tax under this Ordinance, and any loss of income from any source.
sections.content_ur: آمدنی میں اس آرڈیننس کے تحت قابل ٹیکس رقم شامل ہے۔

sections.title: Return of Income
sections.content: Every person whose taxable income for a tax year exceeds the maximum amount that is not chargeable to tax shall furnish a return of income for the year to the Commissioner.
sections.content_ur: ہر وہ شخص جس کی قابل ٹیکس آمدنی حد سے زیادہ ہو انکم ٹیکس ریٹرن جمع کرائے گا۔

sections.title: Assessment
sections.content: The Commissioner may, by notice in writing, require any person to produce before him any accounts, documents, or evidence to verify the correctness of return.
sections.content_ur: کمشنر تحریری نوٹس کے ذریعے کسی شخص سے ریٹرن کی درستگی کی تصدیق کے لیے دستاویزات طلب کر سکتا ہے۔

sections.title: Appeal to Commissioner (Appeals)
sections.content: Any person dissatisfied with any order passed by the Commissioner may prefer an appeal to the Commissioner (Appeals) within thirty days of the date of service of the order.
sections.content_ur: کسی بھی شخص کو کمشنر کے حکم سے عدم اطمینان ہو تو وہ تیس دنوں میں اپیل کر سکتا ہے۔

sections.title: Terrorism Defined
sections.content: A person is said to commit or threaten to commit an act of terrorism if he: (a) in order to, or if the effect of his actions will be to, strike terror or create a sense of fear and insecurity in the people, or any section of the people, does any act or thing by using bombs, dynamite or other explosive or inflammable substances.
sections.content_ur: کوئی شخص دہشت گردی کا مرتکب ہوتا ہے اگر وہ بم دھماکے سے خوف و ہراس پھیلائے۔

sections.title: Punishment for Acts of Terrorism
sections.content: Whoever commits an act of terrorism under this Act, whereby: (a) death is caused, shall be punishable with death or with imprisonment for life, and with fine.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی دہشت گردی کا ارتکاب کرے جس سے موت ہو اسے سزائے موت یا عمر قید ہوگی۔

sections.title: Proscribed Organizations
sections.content: The Federal Government may, by notification in the official Gazette, list an organization if it is involved in terrorism or provides support to terrorism. A person who is a member of such organization shall be punished with imprisonment which may extend to ten years.
sections.content_ur: وفاقی حکومت دہشت گردی میں ملوث تنظیموں کو کالعدم قرار دے سکتی ہے۔

sections.title: Offences Triable by Accountability Court
sections.content: The offences under this Ordinance shall exclusively be triable by the Accountability Court established under this Ordinance.
sections.content_ur: اس آرڈیننس کے تحت جرائم صرف احتساب عدالت میں قابل سماعت ہوں گے۔

sections.title: Punishment for Corruption and Corrupt Practices
sections.content: A person who commits the offence of corruption and corrupt practices shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to fourteen years and with fine.
sections.content_ur: کرپشن کا مرتکب شخص چودہ سال تک قید اور جرمانے کا مستحق ہوگا۔

sections.title: Incorporation of Company
sections.content: Any seven or more persons, or where the company to be formed will be a private company, any two or more persons, associated for any lawful purpose may, by subscribing their names to a memorandum of association and complying with the requirements of this Act in respect of registration, form an incorporated company.
sections.content_ur: سات یا زیادہ اشخاص یا نجی کمپنی کی صورت میں دو یا زیادہ یادداشت ایسوسی ایشن پر دستخط کرکے کمپنی بنا سکتے ہیں۔

sections.title: Directors' Duties
sections.content: A director of a company shall act in good faith in order to promote the objects of the company for the benefit of its members as a whole, and in the best interests of the company, its employees, the shareholders, the community and for the protection of environment.
sections.content_ur: کمپنی کا ڈائریکٹر کمپنی کے مقاصد کو فروغ دینے کے لیے نیک نیتی سے کام کرے گا۔

sections.title: Bar of Limitation
sections.content: Subject to the provisions contained in sections 4 to 25 (inclusive), every suit instituted, appeal preferred, and application made after the prescribed period shall be dismissed although limitation has not been set up as a defence.
sections.content_ur: مقررہ مدت کے بعد دائر کیا گیا ہر مقدمہ خارج کیا جائے گا خواہ تحدید کا دفاع نہ کیا گیا ہو۔

sections.title: Exclusion of Time in Legal Proceedings
sections.content: In computing the period of limitation for any suit, the time requisite for obtaining a copy of the decree or order appealed from, or the time requisite for obtaining the award, shall be excluded.
sections.content_ur: مدت تحدید کے حساب میں فیصلے کی نقل حاصل کرنے کا وقت شامل نہیں ہوگا۔

sections.title: Recovery of Possession of Specific Immovable Property
sections.content: A person entitled to the possession of specific immovable property may recover it in the manner provided by the Code of Civil Procedure.
sections.content_ur: مخصوص غیر منقولہ جائیداد کا حقدار شخص ضابطہ دیوانی کے مطابق اسے واپس حاصل کر سکتا ہے۔

sections.title: Specific Performance of Contracts
sections.content: Except as otherwise provided in this Chapter, the specific performance of any contract may, in the discretion of the court, be enforced. The court shall have the power to grant specific performance when the act agreed to be done is in the performance of a trust.
sections.content_ur: عدالت اپنی صوابدید پر معاہدے کی مخصوص تعمیل کا حکم دے سکتی ہے۔

sections.title: Discretion of Court as to Declaration of Status or Right
sections.content: Any person entitled to any legal character, or to any right as to any property, may institute a suit against any person denying such right, for a declaration that he is so entitled.
sections.content_ur: کسی قانونی حیثیت یا حق کا حقدار شخص اعلانیہ ڈگری کے لیے مقدمہ دائر کر سکتا ہے۔

sections.title: Interpretation
sections.content: When one person signifies to another his willingness to do or to abstain from doing anything, with a view to obtaining the assent of that other to such act or abstinence, he is said to make a proposal. When the person to whom the proposal is made signifies his assent thereto, the proposal is said to be accepted.
sections.content_ur: جب ایک شخص دوسرے کو کچھ کرنے یا نہ کرنے کی رضامندی ظاہر کرے تو وہ تجویز کرتا ہے۔

sections.title: What Agreements Are Contracts
sections.content: All agreements are contracts if they are made by the free consent of parties competent to contract, for a lawful consideration and with a lawful object, and are not hereby expressly declared to be void.
sections.content_ur: تمام معاہدے جو آزاد رضامندی سے جائز عوض اور جائز مقصد کے لیے ہوں وہ قانونی معاہدے ہیں۔

sections.title: Compensation for Breach
sections.content: When a contract has been broken, the party who suffers by such breach is entitled to receive, as compensation for any loss or damage caused to him thereby, such compensation as would naturally arise in the usual course of things from such breach.
sections.content_ur: جب معاہدے کی خلاف ورزی ہو تو نقصان اٹھانے والا فریق معاوضے کا حقدار ہے۔

sections.title: Competence and Number of Witnesses
sections.content: The competence of a person to testify, and the number of witnesses required in any case shall be determined in accordance with the injunctions of Islam as laid down in the Holy Quran and Sunnah for the purposes of hudood and such other cases.
sections.content_ur: گواہی دینے کی اہلیت اور گواہوں کی تعداد اسلامی احکامات کے مطابق طے ہوگی۔

sections.title: Facts Judicially Noticeable Need Not Be Proved
sections.content: No fact of which the Court will take judicial notice need be proved.
sections.content_ur: جس حقیقت کا عدالت عدالتی نوٹس لے اسے ثابت کرنے کی ضرورت نہیں۔

sections.title: Proof of Facts by Oral Evidence
sections.content: All facts, except the contents of documents, may be proved by oral evidence. Oral evidence must, in all cases whatever, be direct.
sections.content_ur: دستاویزات کے مندرجات کے سوا تمام حقائق زبانی شہادت سے ثابت کیے جا سکتے ہیں۔

sections.title: Court May Ask Questions
sections.content: The Court may, in order to discover or to obtain proper proof of relevant facts, ask any question it pleases, in any form, at any time, of any witness, or of the parties about any fact relevant or irrelevant.
sections.content_ur: عدالت متعلقہ حقائق کا مناسب ثبوت حاصل کرنے کے لیے کسی بھی گواہ سے کوئی بھی سوال پوچھ سکتی ہے۔

sections.title: Power of Court to Make Order as to Guardianship
sections.content: Where the Court is satisfied that it is for the welfare of a minor that an order should be made appointing a guardian of his person or property, the Court may make an order accordingly.
sections.content_ur: جب عدالت مطمئن ہو کہ نابالغ کی فلاح کے لیے سرپرست مقرر کرنا ضروری ہے تو وہ حکم دے سکتی ہے۔

sections.title: Matters to Be Considered by Court in Appointing Guardian
sections.content: In appointing or declaring the guardian of a minor, the Court shall, subject to the provisions of this section, be guided by what, consistently with the law to which the minor is subject, appears in the circumstances to be for the welfare of the minor.
sections.content_ur: سرپرست مقرر کرتے وقت عدالت نابالغ کی فلاح کو مدنظر رکھے گی۔

sections.title: Title of Guardian Not to Be Conferred on a Parent
sections.content: Nothing in this Chapter shall authorize the Court to appoint or declare a guardian of the property of a minor whose property is under the superintendence of a Court of Wards.
sections.content_ur: اس باب میں کچھ بھی عدالت کو اختیار نہیں دیتا کہ والدین کو سرپرست کا لقب دے۔

sections.title: Filing of Suit
sections.content: A financial institution may institute a suit in the Banking Court against any person who has obtained any finance from a financial institution and has committed default in payment or repayment.
sections.content_ur: مالیاتی ادارہ بینکنگ کورٹ میں ادائیگی میں چوک کرنے والے شخص کے خلاف مقدمہ دائر کر سکتا ہے۔

sections.title: Limitation
sections.content: The limitation for suits under this Ordinance shall be the same as provided in the Limitation Act, 1908.
sections.content_ur: اس آرڈیننس کے تحت مقدمات کی تحدید حدود ایکٹ 1908 کے مطابق ہوگی۔

sections.title: Prohibition of Cultivation
sections.content: No person shall cultivate any coca bush or poppy plant or cannabis plant. Whoever contravenes shall be punishable with imprisonment which may extend to seven years and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.content_ur: کوئی شخص کوکا جھاڑی، پوست یا بھنگ کاشت نہیں کرے گا۔

sections.title: Punishment for Contravention
sections.content: Whoever contravenes the provisions of this Act with respect to narcotic drug or psychotropic substance shall be punishable: (a) if the quantity is less than one kilogram, with imprisonment which may extend to two years; (c) if the quantity exceeds one kilogram, with death or imprisonment for life.
sections.content_ur: جو کوئی نشہ آور مادے کے بارے میں اس قانون کی خلاف ورزی کرے اسے سزا ہوگی۔

sections.title: Right to Form Trade Union
sections.content: Workers and employers shall have the right to establish and join organizations of their own choosing, subject only to the rules of the organization concerned.
sections.content_ur: مزدوروں اور آجروں کو اپنی پسند کی تنظیمیں قائم کرنے اور شامل ہونے کا حق ہوگا۔

sections.title: Unfair Labour Practice by Employer
sections.content: An employer shall not interfere with, restrain or coerce workers in the exercise of their right to organize. No employer shall discriminate against any worker for being a member of a trade union.
sections.content_ur: آجر مزدوروں کو منظم ہونے کے حق میں مداخلت نہیں کرے گا۔

sections.title: Grounds for Decree for Dissolution
sections.content: A woman married under Muslim Law shall be entitled to obtain a decree for the dissolution of her marriage on any one or more of the following grounds: (i) the whereabouts of husband not known for four years; (ii) husband failed to provide maintenance for two years; (iii) husband sentenced to seven or more years imprisonment; (iv) husband failed to perform marital obligations for three years; (v) husband was impotent at time of marriage; (vi) husband has been insane for two years; (vii) cruelty of husband; (viii) any other ground recognized as valid under Muslim Law.
sections.content_ur: مسلم قانون کے تحت شادی شدہ عورت درج ذیل بنیادوں پر نکاح ختم کرنے کا حکم حاصل کرنے کی حقدار ہوگی۔
